gt_sql: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.LastEditorUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation'
pred_sql: SELECT u.DisplayName FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id WHERE TRIM(p.Title) = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation';
question: What is the display name of the user who last edited the post "Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation"?
